overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a sunlit industrial district with massive electricity pylons, storage tanks, and urban decay. The journey progresses from a wide street with commercial buildings to an industrial zone with graffiti-covered walls, ending with the discovery of a body on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial street with electricity pylons

events.description: crossing the first intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a large industrial building, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the distance

entered.detail: massive gray and orange industrial building with vertical paneling
tall lattice steel electricity transmission towers with multiple power lines
standard traffic signal on black pole at intersection
tall palm trees lining the street
hazy brown hills in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit industrial street with massive electricity pylons dominating the left side and a large modern industrial building on the right. The camera walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, crossing an intersection with traffic lights. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance crossing the road, and the harsh midday sun casts sharp shadows across the pavement.

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction
approaching and crossing the second intersection with red painted crosswalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a red tank top walking the opposite way

notable_agents.action: man in red tank top and gray pants walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with orange and red advertising visible
gray concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the industrial street, passing a pedestrian in a red tank top who walks by in the opposite direction. The electricity pylons remain prominent in the center distance, and a large billboard becomes visible ahead. The segment ends as the camera approaches and crosses a second intersection with a distinctive red-painted crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial tank storage facility with graffiti

events.description: turning right into industrial area with large storage tanks

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial storage tanks and graffiti-covered walls, turning right at the corner

entered.detail: massive cylindrical white storage tanks with metal ladders and railings
concrete wall with large white 'MILITECH' graffiti and 'SET THE TEMPO' tag
industrial overpass connecting buildings with large pipes
rusted derelict vehicles parked along the street
tall industrial building with orange and blue cylindrical silos

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more enclosed industrial zone featuring massive white storage tanks and walls covered in prominent graffiti including 'MILITECH'. The camera turns right along the sidewalk, passing abandoned rusted cars and trash piles. The area feels more derelict and isolated, with an orange industrial building on the right and the overpass visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict industrial backstreet with abandoned vehicles

events.description: discovering a dead body lying on the sidewalk
a brown van drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning left and continuing along the sidewalk, observing a dead body on the ground before proceeding past abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: brown van driving along the street past the camera

entered.detail: dead person lying face down on the concrete sidewalk wearing light colored clothing
futuristic city skyline with tall glass buildings visible in the distance
large rusted industrial pipe bridge crossing over the street
heaps of garbage bags and debris next to abandoned cars

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with a left turn onto a curved sidewalk lined with abandoned cars and trash piles. The camera approaches and passes a dead body lying on the pavement, then continues toward an industrial pipe overpass. In the distance, the futuristic skyscrapers of the city center contrast with the derelict industrial foreground, while a van drives past on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit industrial district that gradually shifts from a wide, active street into a derelict and isolated urban zone. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath massive electricity pylons and modern industrial buildings, crossing a sun-drenched intersection where sparse pedestrians move through sharp midday shadows. As the camera continues forward, it passes a pedestrian in a red tank top and crosses a second intersection marked by a red-painted crosswalk, leading toward a large billboard. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed area dominated by massive white storage tanks and graffiti-covered walls, where the camera turns right to pass rusted cars and trash piles beside an orange industrial building. Finally, the path curves left past a dead body lying on the pavement and heads toward an industrial pipe overpass, with futuristic city skyscrapers appearing in the distance as a van drives past on the adjacent road.
